[Meta Pixel] - Unable to parse JSON-LD tag. Malformed JSON found: '
{
  "@context": "http://schema.org",
  "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
  "image": [
    "https://mwcc.edu/wp-content/uploads/2017/09/academics.jpg"
   ],
  "@id": "https://mwcc.edu",
  "name": "Mount Wachusett Community College",
  "description": "MWCC serves north central Massachusetts with an accessible education aligned to your career goals. We offer associate's degree and certificate programs as well as continuing education classes for personal enrichment. As a community college, our students come from many different backgrounds to achieve the goals of professional growth and personal fulfillment. Most of our students take classes part-time. Some students are trying to change or advance their careers, while others come directly from high school to begin their college journey. We see each student as a whole person. We understand that you may work or balance a family as you take classes. Our faculty and advisors are here to help you grow and achieve success.",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "streetAddress": "444 Green Street",
    "addressLocality": "Gardner",
    "addressRegion": "MA",
    "postalCode": "01440",
    "addressCountry": "US"
  },
  "url": "https://mwcc.edu/about-mwcc/campuses/gardner/",
  "telephone": "978-632-6600"
  },
'.
